untranslatable_reason: This is an entry filter/gating rule, not a position sizing rule. It specifies conditions that must be met BEFORE entering a trade (expected return > cost of carry by 2%, positive margin in 90% of scenarios), but does NOT describe how to size the position once entry conditions are satisfied. Position sizing rules specify allocation amounts, fractions, or scaling methods. This rule is a trade validation gate and belongs in entry condition logic, not position sizing.
